query: any(i in labels for i in ['unsubscribe', 'ai/otp', 'ai/transaction', 'ai/statement', 'ai/investment', 'ai/order', 'ai/subscription', 'ai/notification', 'ai/newsletter', 'ai/promotional', 'ai/social'])
timediff > day and any(i in labels for i in ['unsubscribe']) and not any(i in labels for i in ['ai/actionable', 'ai/personal'])
